role: Spokesman of the Guardian Council; jurist member
bio: Hadi Tahan Nazif is the current spokesman of the [Guardian Council](/orgs/guardian-council) and a jurist member. He serves as the Council's primary public communicator, issuing formal statements on candidate vetting decisions and electoral results. He confirmed [Siamak Rahpeyk](/people/siamak-rahpeyk)'s reappointment as deputy secretary in July 2023.
editorial_notes: Birth year not publicly confirmed. Current GC spokesman, replacing Abbas-Ali Kadkhodaei in that role.
